title: Cloud Security Posture Management Market Expected to Reach USD 15.62 Billion by 2035 | SNS Insider
author: Sns Insider
description: The global Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) market was valued at $5.96 billion in 2025 and is projected to reach $15.62 billion by 2035, growing at a 10.14% CAGR. The market expansion is driven by rapid cloud adoption outpacing manual security management capabilities, with cloud misconfiguration being the leading cause of breaches. North America leads the market with the U.S. representing $2.38 billion, while Europe is projected to reach $4.23 billion by 2035. Large enterprises and BFSI sectors dominate, though SMEs and healthcare are the fastest-growing segments.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Recognized as one of the leading CSPM platform providers globally. The company's 2023 introduction of Prisma Cloud Darwin with AI-powered attack path analysis demonstrates continued innovation and competitive strength in the growing market.

title: This Cloud Company's CEO Just Sold $1.2 Million Worth of Shares
author: Sarah Sidlow
description: Qualys CEO Sumedh S Thakar sold 8,500 shares worth approximately $1.2 million on November 14, 2025, primarily through a stock option exercise plan. The sale reduced his direct holdings to 254,800 shares valued at $36.6 million. Despite the year being relatively flat for the stock, Qualys reported strong Q3 results with 14% GAAP gross profit growth and improved margins, positioning the company well in the growing cloud cybersecurity market.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Despite the CEO's stock sale (which is routine option exercise), the company demonstrated strong fundamentals with 14% GAAP gross profit growth, improved gross margins (84% vs 81% YoY), 33% operating income increase, and solid net income growth. The company operates in the high-growth cloud cybersecurity sector and trades at a reasonable valuation (P/E ~28) relative to software industry average (~33), suggesting positive momentum and market positioning.

title: CrowdStrike Q2 Earnings Preview: Demand Boosts Growth, Profit Outlook in Focus
author: Ali Merchant
description: CrowdStrike is experiencing strong financial performance driven by expansion of its Falcon platform into cybersecurity services, with positive demand signals from data breaches, hybrid work, and cloud migration trends.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Revenue grew almost 20% year-over-year, recognized as a Leader in IDC MarketScape, expanding platform capabilities with 29 cloud modules, and showing strong demand across multiple cybersecurity segments
Exceeded revenue expectations with 16.7% year-over-year growth, but no strong positive or negative indicators mentioned

title: Qualys (QLYS) Q2 Revenue Jumps 10%
author: Jesterai
description: Qualys reported strong Q2 2025 earnings, exceeding analyst expectations with 10% revenue growth and non-GAAP EPS of $1.68. The company showed continued innovation in cloud security and AI technologies, though operating cash flow declined.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Beat analyst estimates on revenue and EPS, raised full-year guidance, demonstrated product innovation in AI and cloud security, maintained strong customer retention rates, and showed growth in international markets

title: Network Security Market by VPN, Data Loss Prevention, Firewall, Secure Web Gateway, DDOS Mitigation, UTM, Branch Campus Network Security, Data Center Network Security - Global Forecast to 2029
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The global network security market is projected to grow from $78.2 billion in 2024 to $111 billion by 2029, driven by increasing reliance on digital transformation and the need for advanced security solutions to protect digital assets and operations.
